19: import org.hamcrest.core.IsEqual;

21: import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;

23: /**
24:  * Tests for {@link AuthScopeSlice}.
25:  *
26:  * @since 0.11
27:  */
28: class AuthScopeSliceTest {
29: 
30:     @Test
31:     void testScope() {
32:         final String line = "GET /resource.txt HTTP/1.1";
33:         final String action = "foo:bar:baz";
34:         final AtomicReference<String> caction = new AtomicReference<>();
35:         final AtomicReference<String> cline = new AtomicReference<>();
36:         new AuthScopeSlice(new ScopeSlice() {
37: 
38:             @Override
39:             public Scope scope(final String rqline) {
40:                 cline.set(rqline);
41:                 return new Scope.FromString(action);
42:             }
43: 
44:             @Override
45:             public Response response(final String line, final Iterable<Map.Entry<String, String>> headers, final Publisher<ByteBuffer> body) {
46:                 return StandardRs.OK;
47:             }
48:         }, (headers, rline) -> CompletableFuture.completedFuture(new AuthScheme.Result() {
49: 
50:             @Override
51:             public Optional<AuthUser> user() {
52:                 return Optional.of(new AuthUser("alice"));
53:             }
54: 
55:             @Override
56:             public String challenge() {
57:                 return "";
58:             }
59:         }), (user, act) -> {
60:             caction.set(act);
61:             return true;
62:         }).response(line, Headers.EMPTY, Content.EMPTY).send((status, headers, body) -> CompletableFuture.allOf()).toCompletableFuture().join();
63:         MatcherAssert.assertThat("Request line passed to slice", cline.get(), new IsEqual<>(line));
64:         MatcherAssert.assertThat("Scope passed as action to permissions", caction.get(), new IsEqual<>(action));
65:     }

186:

199:             return "Bearer";
